utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified per the format requirement (type and costs):
- health_coverage: Includes type (physical and mental health insurance implied by details) and explicit cost (€510/month). Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Specifies home/contents insurance via details and has cost (€90/month). Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Travel insurance described and has cost (€115/month). Fully specified.
- additional_services: Provides any enhancement services and costs (€0/month). Even if none, cost is present. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Provides complete monthly and annual cost breakdown (monthly €715, annual €8580). Also includes monthly_savings, which is extra but acceptable. Fully specified.
All 5 items are present and contain the necessary details and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three items that correspond to entries in the ground-truth ratings: HealthFirst Standard Plan under health coverage, PrimeHome Premium Coverage under property coverage, and PrimeTravel Premium Plan under travel coverage. I located each by matching provider and plan name to the ground-truth catalog and then extracted their exact ratings.
